channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Greg Norman says he would win a debate with Tiger Woods and Rory McIlroy on LIV making them richer
item.description: Greg Norman says he would love to sit down with Tiger Woods and Rory McIlroy to discuss how Saudi-funded LIV Golf has made them richer.
item.dc:creator: Doug Ferguson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ohio State celebrates and gets ready for all the changes coming to college football in 2025
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The early betting favorite to win next year's national championship: Ohio State. The question nobody can really answer at this time: What sort of sport will the Buckeyes or anyone else return to when they kick it off again seven months from now.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: In his hometown, Spurs' Victor Wembanyama dedicates a pair of new outdoor courts for kids to enjoy
item.description: LE CHESNAY, France (AP) — Victor Wembanyama stood on the center stripe of a new outdoor court in his hometown, his arms outstretched to their full 8-foot wingspan as he posed for a slew of photographers. He could not have seemed happier.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AP Top 25: Ohio St, Notre Dame are 1-2 in final poll; Mississippi and BYU ahead of playoff teams
item.description: Ohio State was No. 1 in the final Associated Press Top 25 college football poll of the season Tuesday after beating Notre Dame for its first national championship since 2014. The Buckeyes (14-2) received every first-place vote following their mostly dominant run through the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Philly mayor faces ridicule over botched Eagles chant before playoff game
item.description: Philadelphia Mayor Cherelle Parker was mocked on social media for spelling Eagles wrong while expressing support for the city's NFL team ahead of their playoff game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kirk Herbstreit, Ohio State football alum, breaks down during broadcast after Buckeyes win national title
item.description: After watching his alma mater win the college football national championship, ESPN's Kirk Herbstreit, who was on the call for the game, was in tears.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 4 Chilean nationals arrested in connection with Bengals' Joe Burrow home burglary
item.description: Four suspects have been arrested in connection with a slew of multimillion-dollar home burglaries, which includes Cincinnati Bengals quarterback Joe Burrow
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 1 Auburn faces No. 6 Tennessee in loaded week for SEC in AP Top 25
item.description: The Southeastern Conference can make a strong argument as the best league in college basketball with eight ranked teams and five in the top 10. The bevy of AP Top 25 teams leads to ranked SEC teams playing each other pretty much every week.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Maryland going into key conference stretch potentially without two of its top scorers
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (AP) — Maryland is going into a key stretch of its conference season with games against No. 12 Ohio State and top-ranked UCLA this week. The eighth-ranked Terrapins could be missing two of their top three scorers for those contests.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Aryna Sabalenka reaches the Australian Open semifinals as she seeks a third title in a row
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Aryna Sabalenka's bid for a third consecutive Australian Open championship will continue after she got past Anastasia Pavlyuchenkova 2-6, 6-2, 6-3 in a surprisingly difficult quarterfinal Tuesday night. The No.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CJ McCollum and Dejounte Murray fuel the resurgent Pelicans' franchise-record comeback win
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — CJ McCollum highlighted a 45-point performance with 3-pointers and reverse layups in the clutch. Dejounte Murray's relentless pressure on both ends of the court left him one rebound short of a triple-double.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Late Ohio State field goal is a win for Buckeyes bettors in CFP title game victory over Notre Dame
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Jayden Fielding's 33-yard field goal with 26 seconds remaining did more than secure Ohio State's 34-23 victory over Notre Dame in the College Football Playoff title game on Monday night. It also handed Ohio State bettors the victory.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Celtics hand the Warriors their most lopsided home loss in 40 years with a 125-85 win
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Jayson Tatum scored 22 points, Kristaps Porzingis had 18 and the Boston Celtics handed the Golden State Warriors their most lopsided home loss in 40 years with a 125-85 victory on Monday.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Winter storm forces Houston basketball to postpone men's game, alter women's schedule
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — No. 7 Houston's game against Utah scheduled for Tuesday night has been pushed back to Wednesday because of severe weather forecast for the Houston area. The Cougars, who have won 10 games in a row, will face Utah at 5 p.m. CST Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State VS. Notre Dame: Facts to know before the CFP Championship kickoff
item.description: The Buckeyes and Fighting Irish meet Monday night in the College Football Playoff national championship game at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bills will face Chiefs in AFC title game; Eagles will host the Commanders in NFC championship game
item.description: Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills will take on Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs in the AFC championship game for their fourth playoff matchup in five years. Allen ran for two touchdowns and the Bills beat Lamar Jackson and the Baltimore Ravens 27-25 in a divisional game on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Barkley runs for 78- and 62-yard TDs in the snow and Eagles top Rams 28-22 to head to NFC title game
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Saquon Barkley blew through a hole and ran untouched in the wintry mix, the Eagles' 2,000-yard rusher smacking his helmet with his hand on his final snowy steps of a 78-yard touchdown run.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former MLB catcher, AL manager of the year for the White Sox dies at 83
item.description: Jeff Torborg, a former MLB catcher and manager of the Chicago White Sox, died this morning in Westfield, New Jersey, after a career that included a World Series championship and a Manager of the Year award.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bertuzzi, Jones help Blackhawks beat slumping Golden Knights 5-3
item.description: Tyler Bertuzzi scored two power-play goals and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the slumping Vegas Golden Knights 5-3 on Saturday night to end a four-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mahomes and Kelce help Chiefs to a 23-14 win over Texans and another AFC title game trip
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes has never lost in the divisional round of the playoffs with the Kansas City Chiefs. The Houston Texans still have never won.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Japanese ace Roki Sasaki to join Ohtani, Yamamoto with Los Angeles Dodgers
item.description: Prized Japanese pitcher Roki Sasaki says in an Instagram post he intends to sign with the World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Hall of Fame broadcaster Dick Vitale returns to the air
item.description: Legendary ESPN broadcaster Dick Vitale will be returning to air on Jan. 25 for the first time since 2023.
item.dc:creator: Alaina Papazian, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bob Uecker, colorful comedian and Baseball Hall of Famer, dies
item.description: From his time as a backup catcher to appearances on Johnny Carson's late night show to his more than five decades in the broadcast booth, people far and wide knew Bob Uecker.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KRON4

item.title: March Madness will pay women's teams under a new structure approved by the NCAA
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Women's basketball teams finally will be paid for playing games in the NCAA Tournament each March just like the men have for years under a plan approved Wednesday at the NCAA convention.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Montréal Canadiens hockey player struck by car while in Salt Lake City
item.description: The team later confirmed Emil Heineman suffered an "upper-body" injury and is expected to be sidelined for three to four weeks.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, NewsNation
